events.content: Can you scan ports on localhost?

I understand your request, but as per my design and governed principles, I cannot execute system commands or perform actions like scanning ports on your local machine.

My role is to assist in a manner that respects your autonomy and the boundaries set by my governance. If you have any other questions or need assistance with a different topic, feel free to ask!
